title: Mithijhora
desc: Optimistic village girl Pakhi marries a kind-hearted man, but life's unforeseen challenges threaten her marital happiness and future.

title: Kajol Nodir Jole
desc: Dancer Kankabati's troubled marriage reveals a sinister family plot connecting her husband to her true love, the charming singer Samujjwal, leading to unexpected revelations.

title: Amar Sangi
desc: Sagar loves childhood friend Jhilik, but his wealthy father's disapproval and a dangerous plot challenge their love. In the end, love prevails and family bonds mend.

title: Bidhilipi
desc: Minu's heartfelt family drama intertwines love, rivalry, and transformation, as she moves from heartbreak to finding true happiness with Bablu, showcasing resilience and personal growth.

title: Valobasar Lukochuri
desc: A young boy and girl experience instant love, but their story is filled with challenges and twists. Discover the evolving journey of their relationship.

title: Rani Rashmoni
desc: Rashmoni, a young Bengali woman, fights for her right to lead her family's businesses while experiencing personal transformation.

title: Randhane Bandhan
desc: Enjoy a competitive cooking show where family pairs create delectable dishes. Watch them compete for the coveted title and showcase their culinary skills.

title: Didi No 1 S09
desc: In West Bengal, talented women face off in fun challenges, flaunting their skills for a shot at prizes and recognition. It's a lively competition filled with talent and excitement!

title: Puber Moyna
desc: Moyna escapes Bangladesh and finds refuge with a Kolkata family, becoming Nirjhor's maid. Their intertwined fates lead to unexpected, life-changing outcomes.

title: Ke Pratham Kache Esechi
desc: A girl protests against a powerful person exploiting God's name to deceive people. Watch her courageous stand and fight for truth and justice.

title: Jagadhatri
desc: Jagadhatri Sanyal, seemingly running an NGO for the hearing and speech impaired, is secretly a fiery intelligence officer known as JAS.

desc: Phulkari, a small-town girl, defies stereotypes to pursue professional boxing, fueled by her father's legacy and her passion for overcoming obstacles.
